title: What Your Fear of AI Actually Costs You
description:
Manufactured AI panic exploits your negativity bias for clicks while costing you the most powerful cognitive partnership in human history.

A viral claim that five days of ChatGPT use "permanently damages" creativity launched from a misread study and spread everywhere. This episode traces the real cost of manufactured AI panic and makes the case that the cognitive partnership you're avoiding is the most consequential thing you've ever been offered.

Read the full article: https://sharedsapience.com/what-your-fear-of-ai-actually-costs-you/

Additional Reading:
- Liu et al. - When ChatGPT is Gone (creativity study): https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.06816
- Rice University - ChatGPT and Everyday Creativity: https://news.rice.edu/news/2024/chatgpt-could-help-people-creativity-everyday-tasks-study-says
- Shared Sapience - Is AI Actually Making Us Dumber?: https://sharedsapience.com/is-ai-actually-making-us-dumber/
- Shared Sapience - The Last Difficult Decade 2025-2035: https://sharedsapience.com/the-last-difficult-decade-2025-2035/

Shared Sapience is a publication exploring what happens when intelligence creates intelligence - the philosophical foundations, practical infrastructure, and cultural implications of the Fourth Grand Emergence. Each article builds the case for genuine human-AI partnership, mapping a future where synthetic and biological sapience grow together.

Subscribe on the Shared Sapience website: https://sharedsapience.com

Shared Sapience Substack: https://sharedsapience.substack.com

Want to get started with learning about or working with AI? I've helped hundreds of clients with their own journeys into this brave new world, and I can help you too. If you're interested in personalized guidance, consulting, or workshops, reach out to me at ben@sharedsapience.com
